data.title: Jeff Bezos' Amazon To Pay $40 Million For Melania Trump Documentary: Report
data.description: Amazon is reportedly investing $40 million in a documentary about Melania Trump, directed by Brett Ratner.

data.title: Elon Musk's X, Hewlett Packard Strike $1 Billion AI Server Deal: Report
data.description: Hewlett Packard has reportedly secured a deal worth over $1 billion to supply servers optimized for AI to Elon Musk's social media platform, X.

data.title: T-Mobile Sued Over Massive Data Breach Impacting 79 Million Americans: Sensitive Information Included Names, Addresses, And More
data.description: Washington state has taken legal action against T-Mobile for allegedly neglecting cybersecurity vulnerabilities, leading to a significant data breach in 2021 that impacted 79 million people across the U.S.

data.title: Apple Staring At Market Share Decline In China Amid Declining iPhone Shipments: Top Analyst Flags Why Some Models Could Be Face Shipping Momentum Challenges
data.description: Apple is experiencing a drop in its market share in China. This decline is attributed to a decrease in iPhone shipments, as reported by supply chain analyst Ming-Chi Kuo.

data.title: Bitcoin Supercycle Incoming, Says Economist, But There's A Catch
data.description: Economist and trader Alex Kruger has expressed a bullish outlook on Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), despite the cryptocurrency currently trading 13% below its all-time high.
